form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation second last of 12 at Ascot Rtg 66+ December 6 over 2200m, 4.5 len behind Grand Reserve with 55.5kg at $26. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.9 len Belmont Park Cl1 C&G September 10 over 1400m slow track defeating Hoya Destroyer with 60kg at $10. Anticipating a solid first-up effort.
